content: I've been using Instagram for years and honestly the algorithm is getting worse every single day. It's like they're trying to push ads down my feed instead of showing me content from accounts I actually care about. The app is also so bloated now it takes forever to load and I have to deal with way too many notifications just to scroll through my feed for a few minutes

I'm so over Instagram's constant algorithm changes making my posts invisible to my actual followers I've spent hours curating content only to see it disappear down a rabbit hole of engagement metrics nonsense

I'm so over how Instagram is constantly changing its algorithm to favor likes on older posts. It's like they're sucking the life out of my followers who are actually engaged with the content I post. I've been noticing that if I don't get a certain number of views within an hour or I'll be pushed down to obscurity and it's just not fair to all the creators who put in the effort to produce high-quality content.

I'm so tired of Instagram's algorithm changes always ruining my followback game anyone else fed up with how often I get to see my posts in my feed now its all about who has more likes not who posted first!

Really disappointed with Instagram's algorithm changes again. Now my feed is full of ads and I barely see posts from friends and family. It feels like they're trying to nickel and dime me out of my time. Constantly getting notifications for stuff I don't even care about.

I've been using Instagram for years and it's gotten to be a total waste of time I'm so sick of all these ads taking over my feed and the algorithm is just designed to keep me engaged in stupid videos and selfies that nobody cares about. It used to be a cool place to share moments from your life but now it's just another corporate tool trying to make money off of you

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's algorithm changes they keep pushing my content further and further from my followers who actually care about what I post now I'm just posting to reach a handful of people instead of 1000s like I used to and it feels like nobody cares anymore

I'm so tired of Instagram's constant algorithm changes I used to love using the app but now it feels like they're intentionally trying to make my feed useless just show me what's popular and relevant based on what I actually follow!
I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm it keeps pushing ads at me and I just want to see what my friends are up to without a constant stream of sponsored content taking over my feed

I'm so sick of all these ads on Instagram I used to love using the app but now it's just a never-ending stream of sponsored posts and I'm constantly being asked to share my location or log in with my Facebook account it feels like they're sucking the fun out of the whole experience

Absolutely disgusted with the new update to Instagram I was supposed to be able to upload longer videos but now they've capped it at 60 seconds like what's the point of even having a premium account if we're not getting any real benefits? Have to say I'm seriously considering deleting the app altogether

I'm so sick of Instagram's algorithm constantly showing me the same old friends and family posts I've seen a million times I need to see more interesting content or else I'm just going to stop using the app altogether

I'm so sick of Instagram's algorithm constantly showing me posts from people I don't care about just to keep me engaged for longer. It's like they're trying to drive me crazy with all these ads and sponsored content. Can't they just show me what my friends are posting instead? This app is supposed to be a social network not a never-ending stream of junk.

I'm so over Instagram's algorithm it always shows me my old friends from high school who I haven't spoken to in years and completely ignores my close friends who actually post content that interests me now they're just a tiny fraction of my feed which is honestly super frustrating
I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the algorithm changes now they're more interested in pushing ads than showing me content from accounts I actually care about
I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm changes every few months it feels like they're just trying to keep me from seeing content from my friends and family who aren't influencers or celebrities

I've been using Instagram for years and the algorithm changes are getting ridiculous they always prioritize my ex's old content over my own posts like I'm supposed to be grateful for 10 year old memories instead of actual engagement from people who care about what I post today

I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm it's like they're trying to control what I see and when I can post instead of letting me have some freedom to share my thoughts and connect with friends on my own terms feels like a total waste of time

I'm so over Instagram's algorithm changes every 5 minutes it feels like they're just trying to keep us engaged but really they're just draining our mental energy I mean what's the point of having a social media app that constantly shows me my friends' highlight reels when all I want is a quiet evening at home

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's new algorithm they're pushing everything to my feed that I don't care about and hiding all the accounts I actually like now my home screen is just a bunch of ads and random stuff I don't recognize anymore this was supposed to be a social platform not a dumpster fire

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's algorithm I have to post the same photos over and over just to get some engagement but even that feels like a chore now because I know it's not getting me true followers
I've been using Instagram for years and its always the same issue ads are so annoying now I'm considering deleting the app because of how much time they waste on those stupid videos

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's new algorithm change it keeps showing me ads instead of content from accounts I actually care about and the app is also freezing all the time making it impossible for me to scroll through my feed without losing data

I've been using Instagram for years and the constant algorithm changes are getting ridiculous. Now my posts barely get seen by anyone except my closest friends who happen to be mutuals. I'm so over having to pay for features that were supposed to be free in the first place. The ads are still super intrusive and annoying

totally frustrated with the new updates to instagram I used to love the app but now its so bloated and slow cant even get a decent signal on my phone all these ads are so annoying 10/10 would not recommend to anyone
I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over how they keep changing the algorithm now it's impossible to grow my account organically just using good content anymore

I'm so tired of Instagram's algorithm changing all the time I post a picture and 5 hours later it has like 2 views not to mention the ads are taking up half my feed I just want to see what my friends are posting without all these annoying commercials
I've been using Instagram for years and honestly it's getting so cluttered with ads I feel like I'm not even on my own feed anymore just a giant shopping catalog

Just got a notification that my Instagram account has been compromised and all my private photos are now public I've spent hours getting those posts just to have them stolen from me because of this app's poor security
I was so excited to try out Instagram's new features but after a week of using it I've been met with glitches and slow loading times every single time I open the app is completely unusable now

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so done with the algorithm changes they keep pushing out. Now my feed is filled with ads and old posts from people I haven't interacted with in months. The app is supposed to be all about connecting with friends and family but it's really just a way for them to make money off of your eyeballs

I'm so over how Instagram is constantly changing its algorithm and deleting accounts that post content I don't want to see anymore it's like they're trying to control what we can and can't share with our friends and family this new "reels" feature is just a way for them to make more money off of us and I'm not interested

I'm so over how Instagram is constantly changing its algorithm and making my content disappear from the explore page I feel like I've wasted so much money on buying followers and now they just keep leaving because my engagement isn't high enough The app is also taking forever to load and I've had to deal with multiple crashes already which makes me really frustrated
I've been using Instagram for years and honestly it's gotten worse since they changed their algorithm I feel like my posts are disappearing left and right instead of getting more visibility now

I was so excited to try out Instagram's new feature but it keeps freezing on me and I have no idea how to get it back! The app is always glitching and my feed looks like a mess now I'm seriously considering deleting the app.
I'm so over how Instagram's algorithm is constantly changing and breaking my feed I follow hundreds of accounts but sometimes they don't show up for weeks at a time it's so frustrating!

I'm so tired of Instagram's algorithm ruining my feed I keep seeing the same posts from people I haven't talked to in years it feels like they're more popular than actual friends and I just want to unfollow everyone

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the endless scrolling feed that's just a curated highlight reel of everyone else's perfect life. Can't we just have a chronological view like on Facebook? And don't even get me started on how the app eats up all my battery life it's ridiculous!
I'm so over how Instagram always decides to change its algorithm and now I can barely see posts from people I actually care about in my feed

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's new algorithm they're showing me way too many ads and not enough content from my friends and family I've tried to report some of these ads but nothing ever seems to change still getting bombarded with sponsored posts all day long

I'm so over how Instagram is now forcing me to watch ads before I can even start scrolling through my feed without them taking up half the screen it's like they're nickel and diming us for every single thing we want to see

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the algorithm changes now it's impossible to see posts from accounts that aren't paying for ads their content is buried under endless videos and selfies from influencers who only promote products
I'm so sick of seeing ads on my feed every single day it's like they're not even trying to make Instagram a decent platform anymore

I'm so over how Instagram is slowly ruining my mental health with all these curated highlight reels everyone's posting! It feels like nobody has a bad day or a messy room because they're too busy pretending to have it together Always trying to keep up and it's exhausting

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's new algorithm everything is just a paid ad now feels like I'm constantly being bombarded with stuff I don't even care about and can't even find my friends posts anymore they're pushing us to use their shopping feature which is just annoying it's like they're trying to suck all the money out of our wallets

I've been using Instagram for years and honestly the algorithm is getting so messed up now my posts are barely reaching 10 people let alone getting any real engagement its like the app has given up on providing a decent experience

I'm so over the algorithmic feed I've been following accounts I actually care about and the app keeps pushing them to the side because of some stupid engagement metric that clearly doesn't matter to me anymore. The constant ads are a nightmare too.
I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the constant algorithm changes it's like they're trying to make my feed irrelevant just to sell ads

Having to deal with so many fake accounts on Instagram is really frustrating I've lost count of how many times I've reported suspicious profiles only for them to come back a few days later what's being done to stop this nonsense?

I've been using Instagram for years and lately its just become a total nightmare to use the ads are everywhere even when you're not actively browsing and the algorithm is so biased towards the content from accounts that don't actually have any value anymore I'm sick of seeing the same low effort posts from influencers who only post once a week it's like they're sucking the creativity out of this platform

I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm changes it always seems like they're pushing content I don't want to see down my feed and hiding all the accounts I actually care about just to keep me engaged for more time

I'm so over the constant algorithm changes on Instagram my posts are barely visible and I've lost thousands of followers over the past month to fake accounts that aren't even verified anymore what's the point of having a community if you can't trust who's really following you?
Just spent hours trying to fix my Instagram account login issues and still can't get past this glitch they need to step up their game

I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm constantly showing me ads I don't want to see just because they know my interests are actually related to the stuff I'm trying to buy online not my boring old hobbies from 10 years ago it feels like they're more interested in making money than in letting me have a peaceful feed.

Absolutely fed up with Instagram's algorithm changes. Every time I try to post something new it gets buried under a never-ending feed of ads and low-quality content. The platform is supposed to be about sharing moments from my life but now it feels like just another way for corporations to sell me stuff.

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so sick of the algorithm changes they keep making it's like they're trying to drive me crazy with the constant flooding of low quality content and now my feed is just a never ending stream of selfies and sponsored posts where can you even find a decent article or interesting story anymore
I'm so sick of Instagram's algorithm messing with my feed every 5 minutes I swear they have a personal vendetta against people who don't follow enough influencers

I'm so tired of Instagram's constant algorithm changes it feels like they're intentionally making my feed worse just to make more money off of me I've tried deleting the app and taking breaks but nothing seems to change

I'm so over Instagram's algorithm changes all the time it feels like they're intentionally trying to ruin my feed and I've lost count of how many times I've had to unfollow friends just to see their content again
I'm so over how Instagram is constantly pushing ads down my feed I mean I get it they need to make money but can't they just let me see my friends posts for once?
I'm so done with Instagram's algorithm it always shows me ads when I post something new and not just random stuff anymore it feels like they're trying to monetize my creativity

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the constant algorithm changes they make it impossible to see posts from accounts I actually care about now my feed is filled with ads and irrelevant content completely changed my experience of the app from one I looked forward to waking up to every morning to one I dread checking

I'm so tired of Instagram's constant algorithm changes that ruin my follow-up discovery feed I swear every time I try to find a new account to love they just push more ads instead of real content its like they've given up on being a social media platform

I'm so tired of having to deal with all these fake accounts on Instagram it's like they're taking over the whole platform and I just can't even get a decent conversation going without some bot spewing out cheesy compliments and irrelevant hashtags. The algorithm is literally rigged against me and my content gets lost in the void while everyone else seems to be getting all the attention

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so done with the algorithm they changed last month it's now impossible to see posts from accounts that aren't trying to sell me something or be overly dramatic their new " curated feed" is just a fancy way of saying "we want to keep you engaged by showing you more ads

I'm so over Instagram's algorithm changes every 5 minutes I try to post something and it gets lost in the noise or my followers are gone before I even know what happened Anyone else feel like they're just posting for the sake of posting with no real engagement?

I've been using Instagram for years and its always a struggle to find content that doesn't get lost in the algorithm. They keep changing the rules and making it harder for new accounts to grow without paying. The ads are everywhere and they're so repetitive it's annoying. I'm starting to think I'll just stick to TikTok

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's algorithm its always showing me ads over my friends posts and I cant even see what they're up to anymore the app used to be fun but now its just a money making machine

I'm so frustrated with Instagram's new algorithm they're constantly showing me irrelevant posts and hiding the accounts I actually care about from my feed it feels like they're trying to sell me stuff instead of giving me a genuine experience

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the algorithm changes they keep making now it's all about keeping me engaged with irrelevant ads and endless scrolling my feed is literally a never ending stream of stuff I don't care about

I'm so over Instagram's algorithm I just spent an hour browsing through my feed and only saw 3 posts from people I actually care about the rest were just a bunch of ads or old friends who never post anything interesting

I'm so over Instagram's constant algorithm changes it feels like they're intentionally making it harder for me to see content from accounts I actually care about and all they care about is pushing those annoying ads down my feed

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the algorithm changes they keep making everything is just a highlight reel of people's fake perfect lives nobody posts about their real struggles anymore

I'm so over how Instagram is constantly changing its algorithm to make me think I've already seen every post from my friends when they're not actually posting anything new! It's like they're trying to drive me insane with all these duplicate feeds and endless scrolling.

I've been using Instagram for years and I'm so over the algorithm changes now it's all about getting likes from people you don't even know rather than seeing content from friends and family which is what made me join in the first place

I've been using Instagram for years and its constant algorithm changes are so frustrating I feel like my account is never going to be seen by anyone anymore they keep taking away features that made it enjoyable and now its just a hollow shell of what it used to be

Been using Instagram for years and honestly it's all about the ads now they're pushing so many sponsored posts in my feed I used to enjoy looking at friends' pics but now it feels like I'm getting sold to every brand possible.

Absolutely disgusted with Instagram's algorithm changes lately its like they're intentionally trying to make my feed less engaging and more filled with ads every time I try to have a conversation with someone or post something new I get constant notifications about "popular posts" that are just noise and not even from accounts I actually care about.

Just spent the last hour trying to fix a glitch that's been ruining my Instagram experience and the customer support team is completely unhelpful no one knows what they're doing they just keep sending me generic answers that don't apply to my issue

I'm so tired of Instagram's algorithm prioritizing influencers over actual friends. Every time I try to have a conversation with someone who doesn't have a million followers they automatically start losing engagement on my posts its like they're trying to suck the life out of our friendships
